fault_hypothesis: The check for an expired offer on line 66 uses a strict greater-than comparison (>), which incorrectly considers an offer valid at the exact moment of its deadline. It should use a greater-than-or-equal-to comparison (>=) to correctly expire offers at their deadline.

constraints.intent: An offer should be considered expired at its exact deadline, not just after.
If the offer value is returned, the current time must be strictly before the deadline.
The offer value should only be used if the offer has not yet expired.
